steps: Go to https://cloud.trigger.dev and sign up or log in with GitHub
Create a new project or open an existing one
In the left sidebar, click 'API Keys' under your project settings
Click 'Create API Key', give it a name, and select the environment (Development or Production)
Copy the generated API key — it starts with 'tr_' followed by the environment and a secret string

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Trigger.dev API key (Secret Key), sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free Hobby plan available with 5,000 task runs per month
API keys are environment-scoped: development keys (tr_dev_...) and production keys (tr_prod_...) are separate
Self-hosted Trigger.dev instances use the same API key format but with a custom base URL
The project reference (e.g. prj_xxx) is required as part of API endpoint paths

test_endpoint.description: List recent task runs for the authenticated project
